steps.name: Rough Adaptive / Pocketing
steps.purpose: Bulk material removal with high axial depth and low radial engagement.
steps.parameter_rules: Optimal stepover: 10-15% of tool diameter; Max RPM.

steps.name: Finish Contour / Wall Clean
steps.purpose: Create final surface finish on pockets and side walls.
steps.parameter_rules: Radial stock allowance: 0.010 - 0.015 inches; High SFM; low feed per tooth.
